name: Sopa De Ajo
recipeInstructions:
Serves 4
Trim the crusts from the bread and dice. Cook the bread cubes and garlic in butter and olive oil over medium-high heat until the cubes are golden. Remove and keep warm. Combine stock, bay leaf, and lemon juice in the same pan. Bring to a simmer over medium heat. Break each egg into a saucer and gently slip them into the hot broth. Poach until the whites are set but yolks remain liquid (4 minutes). Using a slotted spoon, carefully transfer each egg to a warm soup bowl. Ladle the broth over the eggs and sprinkle with croutons. Makes 6 cups.
